aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with some structured content and schema markup, but lacks depth in content optimization and review signals.
quick_wins: Generate and showcase customer reviews to build trust and improve local search presence.
Expand content to include location-specific keywords and detailed service descriptions.
Implement a blog to target long-tail keywords and establish topical authority.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile (GBP) is not fully optimized. While core information is present on the website, there is no evidence of an active GBP with reviews and regular updates.
critical_issues: No active GBP or Google reviews found.
Missing GBP posts and regular updates.
Lack of detailed service information in GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on its website, but lacks widespread citations across directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories like Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.
Leverage local business associations and industry-specific directories for additional citations.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and active GBP management.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for HVAC services in Gastonia, NC on Google Maps and local search results.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation system and regularly updating GBP with posts and offers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, localized content and earning backlinks from local businesses and industry publications.

page_title: Unique Air | Trusted HVAC Services in Gastonia, NC
